meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Beat AI Overwhelm
content.seo_description: Overwhelmed by AI tools? Use this expert SaaS starter kit checklist to ship faster, impress clients, and master Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing every new AI tool. The secret to high-velocity freelancing is a hardened SaaS starter kit. By standardizing your stack with Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for implementation, you eliminate decision fatigue, ensure consistent code quality, and cut your development time by 60% per client project.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape is a graveyard of abandoned AI tools and fragmented workflows. You spend more time configuring environments and debating model choices than actually shipping features for your clients. Every new library feels like a trap, and the 'next big thing' only adds to your growing technical debt.

But the chaos ends here. By adopting a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you stop being a tool-collector and start being a product-builder. This checklist provides the exact framework needed to regain your focus, streamline your delivery, and command higher rates by shipping production-ready applications with surgical precision.

steps.title: Establish the Foundation
steps.description: Define the core stack (Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind) to prevent scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS starter boilerplate with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase Auth. Include a clean folder structure for modular components.

steps.title: Configure Authentication Logic
steps.description: Secure the user journey immediately so you can focus on business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement user authentication with Supabase, including protected routes and a middleware-based session check. Ensure error handling is robust.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add auth middleware for protected routes'

steps.title: Database Schema Modeling
steps.description: Structure your data before building the UI to avoid painful migrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a PostgreSQL schema for a SaaS user profile, subscription status, and a generic 'projects' table. Include RLS policies for security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate sql migration for user subscription and projects'

steps.title: UI Component Library Integration
steps.description: Leverage pre-built components to maintain high design standards without custom CSS overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up Shadcn UI in the existing project. Create a responsive dashboard layout with a sidebar and top navigation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'install shadcn components for sidebar and dashboard'

steps.title: Automated Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Enable instant feedback loops with automated Vercel deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project for Vercel deployment, ensuring environment variables for Supabase are correctly mapped.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure vercel.json for production deployment'

pro_tips: Never hardcode environment variables; use a .env.example file to force team/client compliance.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests *before* the implementation code to ensure TDD compliance.
Standardize on a single UI library (Shadcn) to keep your codebase consistent across multiple client projects.
Treat your starter kit as a living repository; commit improvements from every client project back to the master branch.
Use Antigravity to generate 'How to use' documentation for your clients inside the repository to reduce support calls.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is deployed, clone it for your next three client projects to test its modularity. Refine the boilerplate based on features you find yourself re-writing constantly.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the architecture, and the roadmap. Stop tinkering with settings and start shipping products that generate revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
